items.title: What are active ETFs and how are they reshaping how Americans invest?
items.description: Actively managed ETFs hit a $1 trillion milestone in the U.S. as investors look for funds that aim to outperform passive ETFs tracking market indexes.

items.title: A beginner-friendly ETF portfolio that requires almost no maintenance and delivers long-term results
items.description: For a portfolio to count as being both good and easy, it needs to be anchored with a hearty helping of stock market-tracking index funds.
